title: SOX / ITGC — Cisco ISE Data Connect Direct DB Access Audit

compliance.assurance_rationale: PCAOB AS 5 — IT general controls. UC-17.1.58 evidences direct DB access to ISE — bypass of normal admin UI carries elevated risk and requires audit attribution.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that direct database queries against ISE Data Connect are logged with attribution and slow/anomalous queries are visible.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.12.43' archiving Data Connect events to `audit_evidence`.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk DB Connect (2686).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (40400, 40401)
| eval sox_clause="AS5.B27-B29", control="DB_Direct_Access_Audit"
| table _time, dataconnect_user, source_ip, query, sox_clause
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence SOX ITGC over Data Connect direct database access on ISE.
value: Direct DB access bypasses the ISE admin UI's role-based access controls. Continuous logging with attribution is the SOX-required audit trail.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for SOX/ITGC PCAOB AS 2201 evidence.
visualization: SOX ITGC dashboard: Data Connect query timeline.

references.title: UC-17.1.58 — Cisco ISE Data Connect — DB-Direct Query Audit

knownFalsePositives: 1. Splunk DB Connect ingestion queries — exclude via `dataconnect_user` allowlist.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.58 operational; Data Connect enabled on ISE.
- `audit_evidence` with 7y retention.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.12.43: SOX ITGC — Data Connect Audit]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.12.43,reg=SOX,clause=AS5.B27-B29
```
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence SOX ITGC over Data Connect direct database access on ISE. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Run a Data Connect query. Evidence captured.
controlTest.negativeScenario: No Data Connect activity. Empty result.

evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with SOX AS5 tagging.
exclusions: Splunk DB Connect ingestion service account excluded.
